title: Brighton agree £21.5m deal for winger Yohanna
summary: Brighton has agreed to sign Nigerian winger Zadok Yohanna from AIK Stockholm for £21.5m. The deal bolsters the club's attacking options ahead of the new season.
content: Brighton agree to sign Nigerian winger Zadok Yohanna from AIK Stockholm in a deal worth £21.5m.

zh.title: 布莱顿同意以2150万英镑签约边锋约翰娜
zh.summary: 布莱顿已同意以2150万英镑的价格从AIK斯德哥尔摩签下尼日利亚边锋扎多克·约翰娜。这笔交易增强了俱乐部在新赛季前的进攻选择。

title: How to watch the World Cup on the BBC and ITV
summary: The BBC and ITV will provide comprehensive World Cup coverage, including Scotland's first match since 1998 against Haiti on June 14, along with fixtures against Brazil and England's matchup against Ghana.
content: The BBC will broadcast Scotland's first World Cup match since 1998, when they take on Haiti on 14 June, plus their final group match against Brazil and England's group match against Ghana.

zh.title: 如何在BBC和ITV上观看世界杯
zh.summary: BBC和ITV将提供全面的世界杯报道，包括苏格兰自1998年以来首次对阵海地的比赛（6月14日），以及对阵巴西的比赛和英格兰对阵加纳的比赛。

title: Macclesfield FC co-owner suspended following arrest
summary: Robert Smethurst, 48, co-owner of National League North club Macclesfield FC, has been temporarily suspended from his duties following his arrest. The specific details of the incident remain undisclosed.
content: Robert Smethurst, 48, has been "temporarily relieved of his duties", the National League North club said.

zh.title: 马克莱斯菲尔德足球俱乐部联合所有人因被捕而被暂停职务
zh.summary: 48岁的马克莱斯菲尔德足球俱乐部国家联赛北部联合所有人罗伯特·斯梅瑟斯特因被捕而被暂停职务。事件的具体细节仍未披露。

title: Arsenal approach PSG defender Mbemba
summary: Arsenal is pursuing teenage Paris Saint-Germain defender Emmanuel Mbemba on a free transfer this summer. The move would strengthen the Gunners' defensive depth ahead of the new campaign.
content: Arsenal make an approach to sign teenage Paris St-Germain defender Emmanuel Mbemba on a free transfer this summer.

zh.title: 阿森纳接近PSG后卫姆本巴
zh.summary: 阿森纳正寻求在今夏以自由身签下年轻的巴黎圣日耳曼后卫埃曼努埃尔·姆本巴。这笔交易将增强兵工厂的防线深度，为新赛季做准备。

title: Paraguay star Enciso injured in World Cup warm-up
summary: Paraguay forward Julio Enciso's World Cup participation is in doubt after he sustained an injury during a 4-0 friendly win over Nicaragua. The severity of the injury remains to be assessed.
content: Paraguay forward Julio Enciso's World Cup is in doubt after he was injured during a 4-0 friendly win over Nicaragua.

zh.title: 巴拉圭前锋恩西索在世界杯热身赛中受伤

title: Listen: Off the Ball with guests Grant Stott & JJ Bull

content: Who will win the FIFA World Cup? Instead of predicting a final winner, we've picked every single result to show HOW our predicted winner will do it.

title: Sullivan steps down at West Ham over historical allegations
summary: West Ham United co-owner David Sullivan has resigned from his positions as joint chairman and director following historical allegations against him.
content: West Ham United co-owner David Sullivan steps down from his position as joint chairman and director of the club.

title: Lightning halts pre-World Cup friendly in Texas for two hours
summary: A World Cup warm-up match between Saudi Arabia and Puerto Rico in Texas was suspended for nearly two hours due to dangerous lightning and extreme weather conditions.
content: Saudi Arabia's World Cup warm-up game against Puerto Rico in Texas is halted for nearly two hours because of extreme weather.

title: Gregg Berhalter's USMNT firing helped pave the way...
summary: Two years after his firing as USMNT coach, Gregg Berhalter will watch his son Sebastian represent the team at the World Cup, a development Berhalter says he never anticipated.
content: Two years after Gregg Berhalter was fired as coach, son Sebastian will play for the USMNT at the World Cup. "I never could have picked him," Gregg said.

content: How can Barcelona navigate their financial restrictions to reach even greater heights? Gab Marcotti and Sam Marsden break it down.

summary: Wales visits Romania for their first matchup since a 1992 World Cup qualifier, with memories of Romania's Hagi-led dominance from that era still looming.
content: Wales travel to Bucharest to face Romania on Saturday for the first time since their World Cup qualifying defeat in 1992.

title: McLeish given St Mirren chance - how have young Premieship coaches fared?
summary: St Mirren appointed young interim manager Craig McLeish permanently, prompting a look at how other youth-focused coaching hires have performed in the Scottish Premiership.
content: St Mirren have chosen youth over experience in sticking with interim manager Craig McLeish in the long term, but how have other young managers fared in the Scottish Premiership?

title: Wales aim to right their wrongs against the Czechs
summary: Wales seeks redemption against the Czech Republic after a disappointing result in Montenegro threatened their path to the Women's World Cup.
content: Wales' trip to Montenegro did not go according to plan and, as a result, the path to the Women's World Cup is unchanged.

zh.summary: 威尔士在黑山的失利威胁到他们通往女足世界杯的道路后，寻求对捷克共和国的救赎。

title: The underrated impact of Scotland's back-shaving hype man
summary: Scotland player Liam Kelly has been identified by teammates as the squad's unofficial hype man, highlighting an often-overlooked role in team morale and cohesion.
content: Liam Kelly looks perplexed after being told he has been singled out by some team-mates as Scotland's "hype man".

zh.title: 苏格兰队士气鼓舞者被低估的影响力
zh.summary: 苏格兰球员利亚姆·凯利被队友认定为球队的非正式士气鼓舞者，突出了在球队士气和凝聚力中经常被忽视的作用。

title: Which World Cup team are you? Take our quiz
summary: BBC Sport offers an interactive quiz to help football fans find a World Cup team to support, whether they are neutrals seeking a primary team or supporters looking to follow a second side. The quiz represents media efforts to deepen fan engagement during the tournament.
content: Whether you're a neutral in need of a team to support or just fancy following a second side, BBC Sport has got you covered.

zh.title: 你是哪支世界杯球队？做做我们的问卷
zh.summary: BBC体育提供了一个互动问卷，帮助足球迷找到支持的世界杯球队，无论他们是寻求主队的中立者还是想跟随第二支球队的支持者。该问卷代表了媒体在赛事期间加深球迷参与度的努力。

title: The pioneer in an unlikely World Cup team
summary: Desmond Armstrong made history as a pioneering player for an unlikely World Cup team in 1990, though his first media encounter at the tournament left a lasting impression for the wrong reasons. The article explores his unexpected path to football's biggest stage.
content: When Desmond Armstrong faced the media at the World Cup in 1990, the first question he got was one that would stick in his mind for the wrong reasons.

zh.title: 不太可能的世界杯球队中的先驱
zh.summary: 德斯蒙德·阿姆斯特朗在1990年作为一支不太可能的世界杯球队的先驱球员创造了历史，尽管他在比赛期间的第一次媒体接触因错误的原因留下了深刻印象。这篇文章探讨了他通往足球最大舞台的意外之路。

title: Mr Irreplaceable and Ballon d'Or contender - is this Kane's time?
summary: Harry Kane faces pressure to prove himself as more than England's irreplaceable player at the World Cup, with Ballon d'Or contention riding on his ability to perform on the tournament's biggest stage. The article examines whether this is Kane's moment to establish himself as the world's best.
content: Harry Kane has been described as irreplaceable for England, but will the World Cup provide the stage for him to prove he is now the best?

zh.title: 不可或缺的先生和金球奖竞争者——这是凯恩的时刻吗？
zh.summary: 哈里·凯恩面临着证明自己不仅仅是英格兰在世界杯上不可或缺的球员的压力，金球奖竞争取决于他在比赛最大舞台上的表现能力。这篇文章探讨了这是否是凯恩建立自己作为世界最佳球员地位的时刻。

title: 'The things that forge them are similar' - the origins of Messi & Ronaldo
summary: Lionel Messi and Cristiano Ronaldo both emerged from humble beginnings to become two of football's greatest athletes, with BBC Sport analyzing the parallel circumstances that shaped their extraordinary careers. Their similar origins underscore how adversity can forge world-class talent.
content: Both from humble beginnings, BBC Sport looks at how Lionel Messi and Cristiano Ronaldo became two of the greatest footballers of all time.

zh.title: "锻造他们的东西是相似的"——梅西和罗纳尔多的起源
zh.summary: 莱昂内尔·梅西和克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多都从卑微的出身脱颖而出，成为足球历史上最伟大的运动员之二。BBC体育频道分析了塑造他们非凡职业生涯的平行环境，他们相似的起源凸显了逆境如何能够锻造出世界级人才。

title: Iran's football team granted visas to enter US for World Cup, officials say
summary: Iran's national football team received approval to enter the United States for the World Cup, with the visa grant coming just 10 days before their opening match against New Zealand in Los Angeles. The news resolves logistical uncertainty surrounding the team's participation.
content: The approval comes just 10 days before the Iranian squad's opening match against New Zealand in Los Angeles.

zh.title: 伊朗足球队获得签证进入美国参加世界杯，官员称
zh.summary: 伊朗国家足球队获得进入美国参加世界杯的批准，签证获准距离他们在洛杉矶对阵新西兰的首场比赛仅有10天。这一消息解决了围绕该队参赛的后勤不确定性。
